content.full_text:
TO: Advice Log

FROM: Carla Wardlow

RE: Request from Scott Sadler in Tricia Hunter's Office
    Our File No. 91-375

Spoke to Mr. Sadler on September 5, 1991, to obtain some additional information. He said the matter has been resolved and he would like to withdraw his request for advice.
